title: Provider Groups
description: Manage provider groups and their cost multipliers.
cannotDeleteDefault: The default group cannot be deleted
confirmDeleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete group "{name}"? Providers in this group will not be affected.
noGroupsDesc: Create your first provider group to organize providers.
duplicateName: A group with this name already exists
invalidMultiplier: Please enter a valid non-negative cost multiplier
groupInUse: Cannot delete a group that is still referenced by providers
descriptionTooLong: Description must be 500 characters or fewer
invalidStickyTtl: Sticky TTL must be an integer between 1 and 720 hours
invalidMaxActiveUsers: Max active users must be an integer greater than 0

stickyEnabled.label: Enable User Stickiness
stickyEnabled.description: Pin each user to the same account across sessions; when off, falls back to existing weight/priority selection

stickyTtlHours.label: Sticky TTL (hours)
stickyTtlHours.helper: 1-720 (30 days max). Common: 24=1 day, 168=7 days, 720=30 days

maxActiveUsers.label: Max Active Users per Account
maxActiveUsers.helper: Cap on concurrent active users per account in this group; exceeding sends new users to other accounts; if all are full, returns 503

loadSortMode.label: Load-balance ranking
loadSortMode.helper: When sticky is on, how to pick the least-loaded account inside the min-priority tier. Default ranks by headcount; switch to weighted to spread heavy users.

headcount.label: By active user count
headcount.description: Each user counts as 1; pick the account with the fewest users

weighted.label: By weighted load (token usage)
weighted.description: With N enabled accounts in group: top-N users heavy (weight N), next-N medium (weight ceil(N/2)), rest normal (1). Automatically spreads heavy users across accounts

activeUsers.dialogDesc: Group "{group}" currently has {count} active users, cap {cap}
activeUsers.empty: No active sticky users right now
activeUsers.weightTooltip: Derived from this group's past-7-days token-usage rank; bucket sizes scale with the group's enabled-account count. Only affects selection in weighted-load mode
